svg.title: match logo
svg.desc: Wordmark logo reading "match" in bold rounded blue lettering

text.style: fill:rgb(37, 99, 235);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", Nunito, "Varela Round", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:96px;font-weight:800;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
